meaning: n.亲戚,关系词,相关物,亲缘植物adj.有关系的,相对的,比较而言的
examples: He's a distant relative of the mayor.
She enjoyed the relative informality of island life.
Fitness is relative; one must always ask "Fit for what?"
They do not want to risk the relative performance rank they achieved on the downside.
Consider the disparity in the relative chunks of income that go toward food and drink.
